detail: TASK-PRE Codex gpt-5.5 review Verdict=Revise (tokens=167396). HIGH-1/2 反映: I3 を ECL live seam foundation に拡張 (cycle/world seam 全所有)、I4 は integration 純 harness。sink 層 MEDIUM は house-style で解決 (contracts/ecl.py 不要)。全 HIGH/MEDIUM 反映、却下なし。
contracts/geometry.py SSOT 昇格 + world/zones.py shim。in-session feature-branch (feat/ecl-v0)。
test_geometry.py 14 tests 緑 + test_zones/d0_stub 無改変 pass。
AC1-6 全緑。pre-push CI parity 4 段 ALL CHECKS PASSED (3323 passed, 66 skipped, 416s)。contracts/geometry SSOT 昇格 + zones shim 完了。
cognition/embodiment.py 履歴依存目的地幾何 resolver + EclRecordMode + continuity gate。in-session feature-branch (feat/ecl-v0)、Plan mode 非適用 (契約凍結済)。

test_ecl_embodiment.py 17 tests 緑 (policy grammar frozen / continuity positive 両 clamp 分岐 exact oracle / negative + location=None/total_weight<=0 fallback / history-dependent / no-measurement-reentry import+output guard / centroid math / EclRecordMode)。

AC1-6 全緑。pre-push CI parity 4 段 ALL CHECKS PASSED (ruff format+check / mypy 229 files / pytest 3340 passed, 66 skipped, 374s)。resolver=純関数 (retrieve k_world=0/mark_recalled=False → strength-weighted centroid → disc_jitter → reflect_clamp 順序 frozen 一致)、continuity gate=exact oracle (ε 非使用) construction 検査 (measurement 非再入・verdict holding)。

ECL live seam foundation。cognition/cycle.py ECL 分岐 + world/tick.py ecl_trace_sink + schemas CycleResult carrier。in-session feature-branch (feat/ecl-v0)、Plan mode 非適用 (契約凍結済)、flag-off byte-invariant が最上位契約。

新規 6 tests 緑 (test_ecl_cycle.py: AC1 flag_off_byte_invariant / AC4 deterministic_injection / AC5 reflection_skipped。test_ecl_trace_sink.py: AC2 embodied_move_continuous / AC3 move_msg_history_dependent / AC6 trace_sink_noop_and_axes)。既存 test_cognition+test_world 618 全緑 = flag-off byte-invariant 実証。

AC1-6 全緑。CI parity 4 段緑 (ruff format --check / ruff check / mypy src 229 files / pytest 3346 passed, 66 skipped, 391s)。cycle: ecl_mode=None で byte 不変、_resolve_ecl_move/_pin_envelope_clock helper で step 複雑度維持、reflection record-mode disable、CycleResult.ecl_destination carrier surface。world: ecl_trace_sink 1本 (house-style primitive)、physics_tick_index 30Hz 別軸、_emit_ecl_trace step_kinematics 後 sorted(agent_id) 発火。
